<html lang="en"><head><meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Stillpoint Recovery — Hero Direction 1</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
<script src="https://code.iconify.design/iconify-icon/1.0.7/iconify-icon.min.js"></script>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin="">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Instrument+Sans:wght@400;500;600&family=Onest:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
/* =========================================================
GLOBAL / FOUNDATION
========================================================= */
:root {
--bg: #0d0f10;
--surface: #171a1c;
--surface-2: #1c2122;
--text: #e7e3da;
--text-soft: #a9b1ac;
--muted: #7f8782;
--sage: #8ea596;
--bronze: #a88a6d;
--bronze-soft: rgba(168, 138, 109, 0.18);
--border-dark: rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.08);
--ink: #2d2a26;
--ink-soft: #5f5850;
--paper: #efece6;
--paper-2: #e8e3db;
}
* {
box-sizing: border-box;
}
html {
scroll-behavior: smooth;
}
body {
margin: 0;
background:
radial-gradient(circle at 50% 0%, rgba(168, 138, 109, 0.08), transparent 22%),
radial-gradient(circle at 12% 18%, rgba(142, 165, 150, 0.05), transparent 20%),
linear-gradient(180deg, #111314 0%, #0d0f10 42%, #0b0c0d 100%);
color: var(--text-soft);
font-family: 'Onest', sans-serif;
-webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
}
.font-head {
font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif;
}
/* =========================================================
SECTION 1: HERO / STILLPOINT INTRODUCTION
========================================================= */
.hero-shell {
max-width: 1500px;
margin: 0 auto;
padding: 24px;
}
.hero-card {
position: relative;
overflow: hidden;
border: 1px solid var(--border-dark);
border-radius: 30px;
background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(23, 26, 28, 0.92), rgba(14, 16, 17, 0.98));
box-shadow:
inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02),
0 30px 90px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.24);
}
.top-image-zone {
position: relative;
min-height: 760px;
overflow: hidden;
background: #d6d0c8;
}
.top-image-zone img {
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
width: 100%;
height: 100%;
object-fit: cover;
transform: scale(1.01);
}
.top-image-zone::after {
content: '';
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
background:
linear-gradient(180deg,
rgba(12, 12, 12, 0.08),
rgba(12, 12, 12, 0.18) 34%,
rgba(12, 12, 12, 0.24) 64%,
rgba(12, 12, 12, 0.42) 100%),
linear-gradient(0deg,
rgba(13, 15, 16, 0.60) 0%,
rgba(13, 15, 16, 0.24) 20%,
rgba(13, 15, 16, 0.00) 42%),
radial-gradient(circle at 50% 18%, rgba(168, 138, 109, 0.10), transparent 18%),
linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04), transparent 20%);
pointer-events: none;
}
.top-image-zone::before {
content: '';
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
background-image:
linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02) 1px, transparent 1px),
linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02) 1px, transparent 1px);
background-size: 80px 80px;
mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at center, black 24%, transparent 88%);
-webkit-mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at center, black 24%, transparent 88%);
opacity: 0.18;
pointer-events: none;
}
.nav-wrap {
position: absolute;
left: 50%;
top: 32px;
transform: translateX(-50%);
z-index: 3;
width: min(calc(100% - 48px), 980px);
}
.nav-pill {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: space-between;
gap: 20px;
padding: 12px 16px;
border-radius: 999px;
border: 1px solid rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.12);
background: rgba(24, 22, 20, 0.16);
backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.03);
}
.nav-link {
color: rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.74);
text-decoration: none;
transition: color 180ms ease, opacity 180ms ease;
}
.nav-link:hover {
color: var(--text);
opacity: 1;
}
.brand-mark {
width: 36px;
height: 36px;
border-radius: 999px;
border: 1px solid rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.14);
background: rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.04);
display: inline-flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
color: var(--text);
font-size: 11px;
letter-spacing: 0.16em;
text-transform: uppercase;
flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.brand-name {
color: var(--text);
}
.brand-sub {
color: rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.64);
}
.nav-book-btn {
display: inline-flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 10px;
border-radius: 999px;
background: rgba(45, 42, 38, 0.72);
padding: 10px 18px;
color: var(--paper);
text-decoration: none;
font-size: 12px;
font-weight: 500;
letter-spacing: 0.16em;
text-transform: uppercase;
box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
transition: transform 180ms ease, background 180ms ease;
}
.nav-book-btn:hover {
transform: translateY(-1px);
background: rgba(45, 42, 38, 0.86);
}
.mobile-menu-btn {
display: none;
width: 42px;
height: 42px;
border-radius: 999px;
border: 1px solid rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.14);
background: rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.05);
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
color: var(--text);
flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.hero-copy {
position: relative;
z-index: 2;
display: flex;
min-height: 760px;
flex-direction: column;
justify-content: center;
align-items: center;
text-align: center;
padding: 140px 24px 88px;
}
.eyebrow {
display: inline-flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 10px;
padding: 10px 14px;
border-radius: 999px;
border: 1px solid rgba(168, 138, 109, 0.28);
background: rgba(18, 21, 23, 0.24);
backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
color: rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.84);
font-size: 11px;
letter-spacing: 0.18em;
text-transform: uppercase;
}
.eyebrow-dot {
width: 8px;
height: 8px;
border-radius: 999px;
background: var(--bronze);
box-shadow: 0 0 0 7px rgba(168, 138, 109, 0.08);
}
.hero-title {
margin: 22px 0 0;
max-width: 1100px;
font-size: clamp(3.1rem, 6vw, 5.7rem);
line-height: 0.90;
letter-spacing: -0.07em;
color: var(--text);
}
.hero-title .block {
display: block;
}
.hero-divider {
width: 170px;
height: 1px;
margin: 26px auto 0;
background: linear-gradient(90deg,
rgba(168, 138, 109, 0),
rgba(168, 138, 109, 0.74),
rgba(168, 138, 109, 0));
}
.hero-text {
max-width: 820px;
margin: 22px auto 0;
font-size: 17px;
line-height: 1.95;
color: rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.88);
text-shadow: 0 1px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10);
}
.bottom-paper {
background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--paper), var(--paper-2));
padding: 42px 40px 52px;
color: var(--ink);
border-top: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
}
.section-kicker {
font-size: 11px;
line-height: 1;
letter-spacing: 0.22em;
text-transform: uppercase;
color: var(--bronze);
margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.section-title {
margin: 0;
font-size: clamp(2.25rem, 4.1vw, 4rem);
line-height: 0.96;
letter-spacing: -0.06em;
color: var(--ink);
}
.section-title-split {
font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.7vw, 3.5rem);
line-height: 0.96;
}
.section-title-split .reveal-line {
display: block;
}
.section-text {
margin: 0;
font-size: 15px;
line-height: 1.95;
color: var(--ink-soft);
max-width: 620px;
}
.cta-row {
display: flex;
flex-wrap: wrap;
gap: 12px;
margin-top: 24px;
}
.btn-primary,
.btn-secondary {
display: inline-flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 10px;
padding: 14px 22px;
border-radius: 999px;
font-size: 14px;
font-weight: 500;
text-decoration: none;
transition:
transform 180ms ease,
background 180ms ease,
color 180ms ease,
border-color 180ms ease;
}
.btn-primary {
background: var(--ink);
color: var(--paper);
}
.btn-primary:hover {
transform: translateY(-1px);
}
.btn-secondary {
border: 1px solid rgba(45, 42, 38, 0.12);
color: var(--ink);
background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.36);
}
.btn-secondary:hover {
border-color: rgba(168, 138, 109, 0.28);
background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.50);
}
.method-layout {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 0.92fr 1.08fr;
gap: 40px;
align-items: start;
}
.method-left,
.method-right {
min-width: 0;
}
.method-right {
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
}
.method-right-text {
margin-bottom: 28px;
}
.method-cards-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
gap: 24px;
align-items: start;
}
.method-card {
position: relative;
min-height: 460px;
border-radius: 22px;
overflow: hidden;
background: #d8d3cb;
border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
transition: transform 0.3s ease;
}
.method-card::before {
content: "";
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
background: radial-gradient(500px circle at var(--mouse-x) var(--mouse-y),
rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22),
transparent 40%);
z-index: 2;
opacity: 0;
transition: opacity 0.4s ease;
pointer-events: none;
}
.method-card::after {
content: "";
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
padding: 1px;
border-radius: inherit;
background: radial-gradient(380px circle at var(--mouse-x) var(--mouse-y),
rgba(168, 138, 109, 0.26),
transparent 42%);
-webkit-mask: linear-gradient(#fff 0 0) content-box, linear-gradient(#fff 0 0);
-webkit-mask-composite: xor;
mask-composite: exclude;
z-index: 3;
opacity: 0;
transition: opacity 0.4s ease;
pointer-events: none;
}
.method-card:hover::before,
.method-card:hover::after {
opacity: 1;
}
.method-card:hover {
transform: translateY(-4px);
}
.method-card-image {
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
width: 100%;
height: 100%;
display: block;
object-fit: cover;
transition: transform 0.7s ease;
filter: saturate(0.82) brightness(0.96);
}
.method-card:hover .method-card-image {
transform: scale(1.06);
}
.method-card-overlay {
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
z-index: 1;
background:
linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02) 0%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08) 52%, rgba(13, 15, 16, 0.68) 100%);
pointer-events: none;
}
.method-card-content {
position: absolute;
inset: auto 0 0 0;
z-index: 4;
padding: 22px 22px 20px;
}
.method-card.reveal-seq {
opacity: 0;
transform: translateY(34px);
transition:
opacity 0.95s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1),
transform 0.95s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
}
.method-card.reveal-seq.is-revealed {
opacity: 1;
transform: translateY(0);
}
.icon-pulse {
position: relative;
display: inline-flex;
color: var(--bronze);
}
.sonar-ring {
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
border-radius: 50%;
border: 1px solid currentColor;
animation: sonar 2s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1) infinite;
pointer-events: none;
}
/* =========================================================
SECTION 2 ALT: INTERACTIVE RITUAL PANELS
========================================================= */
.ritual-panels-section {
position: relative;
}
.ritual-panels-shell {
max-width: 1500px;
margin: 0 auto;
padding: 0 24px 24px;
}
.ritual-panels-frame {
position: relative;
overflow: hidden;
border: 1px solid rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.08);
border-radius: 30px;
background:
radial-gradient(circle at top center, rgba(168, 138, 109, 0.08), transparent 18%),
linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(23, 26, 28, 0.94), rgba(14, 16, 17, 0.98));
box-shadow:
inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02),
0 30px 90px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.20);
}
.ritual-panels-frame::before {
content: "";
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
pointer-events: none;
background:
linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.015), transparent 16%, transparent 84%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.015)),
radial-gradient(circle at 18% 14%, rgba(142, 165, 150, 0.04), transparent 18%);
}
.ritual-panels-header {
position: relative;
z-index: 2;
padding: 84px 34px 34px;
}
.ritual-panels-header-grid {
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
align-items: center;
text-align: center;
gap: 22px;
}
.ritual-panels-header>.ritual-panels-header-grid>div {
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
align-items: center;
}
.ritual-panels-kicker {
margin: 0 0 16px;
font-size: 11px;
line-height: 1;
letter-spacing: 0.22em;
text-transform: uppercase;
color: var(--bronze);
}
.ritual-panels-title {
margin: 0;
font-size: clamp(2.3rem, 4.4vw, 4.6rem);
line-height: 0.94;
letter-spacing: -0.065em;
color: var(--text);
}
.ritual-panels-title .reveal-line {
display: block;
}
.ritual-panels-text {
margin: 0;
max-width: 760px;
font-size: 16px;
line-height: 1.9;
color: rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.80);
}
.ritual-panels-grid {
position: relative;
z-index: 2;
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
min-height: 640px;
}
.ritual-panel {
position: relative;
overflow: hidden;
min-height: 640px;
background: #1a1d1f;
border-left: 1px solid rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.06);
cursor: pointer;
}
.ritual-panel:first-child {
border-left: none;
}
.ritual-panel-image {
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
width: 100%;
height: 100%;
object-fit: cover;
transition: transform 700ms ease, filter 700ms ease;
}
.ritual-panel:hover .ritual-panel-image {
transform: scale(1.04);
filter: saturate(0.76) brightness(0.78);
}
.ritual-panel-overlay {
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
background:
linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(13, 15, 16, 0.08) 0%, rgba(13, 15, 16, 0.12) 28%, rgba(13, 15, 16, 0.78) 100%);
pointer-events: none;
}
.ritual-panel::after {
content: "";
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
z-index: 3;
background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(13, 15, 16, 0.04) 0%, rgba(13, 15, 16, 0.18) 100%);
opacity: 0;
transition: opacity 400ms ease;
pointer-events: none;
}
.ritual-panel:hover::after {
opacity: 1;
}
.ritual-panel-base {
position: absolute;
left: 0;
right: 0;
bottom: 0;
z-index: 3;
padding: 28px 22px 24px;
transition: opacity 260ms ease, transform 260ms ease;
}
.ritual-panel:hover .ritual-panel-base {
opacity: 0;
transform: translateX(-10px);
}
.ritual-panel-index {
display: block;
margin-bottom: 8px;
font-size: 11px;
letter-spacing: 0.20em;
text-transform: uppercase;
color: rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.62);
}
.ritual-panel-title {
margin: 0;
font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 3vw, 3.6rem);
line-height: 0.95;
letter-spacing: -0.045em;
color: var(--text);
}
.ritual-panel-detail {
position: absolute;
inset: 0 0 0 auto;
width: 78%;
z-index: 4;
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
justify-content: flex-end;
padding: 28px 22px 24px;
background: linear-gradient(180deg,
rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.10) 0%,
rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.08) 18%,
rgba(35, 39, 40, 0.56) 55%,
rgba(27, 31, 33, 0.82) 100%);
backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
-webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
border-left: 1px solid rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.10);
box-shadow: inset 1px 0 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
opacity: 0;
transform: translateX(100%);
transition: opacity 400ms ease, transform 520ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
}
.ritual-panel:hover .ritual-panel-detail {
opacity: 1;
transform: translateX(0);
}
.ritual-panel-line {
width: 0;
height: 1px;
margin-bottom: 20px;
background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(168, 138, 109, 0.88), rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.34));
transition: width 500ms ease 120ms;
}
.ritual-panel:hover .ritual-panel-line {
width: 100%;
}
.ritual-panel-detail-title {
margin: 0;
font-size: 28px;
line-height: 1;
letter-spacing: -0.045em;
color: var(--text);
}
.ritual-panel-detail-text {
margin: 14px 0 0;
max-width: 28ch;
font-size: 14px;
line-height: 1.8;
color: rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.82);
}
.ritual-panel-tags {
display: flex;
flex-wrap: wrap;
gap: 10px;
margin-top: 18px;
}
.ritual-panel-tags span {
display: inline-flex;
align-items: center;
min-height: 32px;
padding: 0 11px;
border-radius: 999px;
border: 1px solid rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.10);
background: rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.04);
font-size: 11px;
color: rgba(231, 227, 218, 0.76);
}
/* =========================================================
SECTION 3: STUDIO EXPERIENCE / DESIGNED ENVIRONMENT
========================================================= */
.studio-section {
position: relative;
}
.studio-shell {
max-width: 1500px;
margin: 0 auto;
padding: 0 24px 24px;
}
.studio-frame {
position: relative;
overflow: hidden;
border: 1px solid rgba(45, 42, 38, 0.08);
border-radius: 30px;
background:
radial-gradient(circle at top center, rgba(168, 138, 109, 0.07), transparent 20%),
linear-gradient(180deg, var(--paper) 0%, var(--paper-2) 100%);
box-shadow:
inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.34),
0 24px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
}
.studio-frame::before {
content: "";
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
pointer-events: none;
background:
linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22), transparent 14%, transparent 86%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02)),
radial-gradient(circle at 18% 14%, rgba(142, 165, 150, 0.04), transparent 18%);
}
.studio-grid {
position: relative;
z-index: 1;
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 0.92fr 1.08fr;
gap: 44px;
align-items: stretch;
padding: 88px 34px;
}
.studio-copy {
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
justify-content: space-between;
min-width: 0;
}
.studio-kicker {
margin: 0 0 16px;
font-size: 11px;
line-height: 1;
letter-spacing: 0.22em;
text-transform: uppercase;
color: var(--bronze);
}
.studio-title {
margin: 0;
max-width: 12ch;
font-size: clamp(2.3rem, 4vw, 4.3rem);
line-height: 0.94;
letter-spacing: -0.065em;
color: var(--ink);
}
.studio-title .reveal-line {
display: block;
}
.studio-text {
margin: 28px 0 0;
max-width: 500px;
font-size: 15px;
line-height: 1.95;
color: var(--ink-soft);
}
.studio-note {
margin-top: 28px;
max-width: 500px;
padding-top: 18px;
border-top: 1px solid rgba(168, 138, 109, 0.24);
font-size: 14px;
line-height: 1.85;
color: rgba(118, 100, 84, 0.88);
}
.studio-points {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 1fr;
gap: 18px;
margin-top: 40px;
}
.studio-point {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 28px 1fr;
gap: 16px;
align-items: start;
padding-top: 18px;
border-top: 1px solid rgba(45, 42, 38, 0.08);
}
.studio-point:first-child {
padding-top: 0;
border-top: none;
}
.studio-point-index {
font-size: 11px;
line-height: 1;
letter-spacing: 0.18em;
text-transform: uppercase;
color: var(--bronze);
padding-top: 5px;
}
.studio-point-text {
font-size: 15px;
line-height: 1.82;
color: var(--ink-soft);
max-width: 44ch;
}
.studio-media {
min-width: 0;
display: grid;
grid-template-rows: auto auto;
gap: 18px;
}
.studio-main-card {
position: relative;
min-height: 540px;
border-radius: 24px;
overflow: hidden;
background: #ddd7cf;
border: 1px solid rgba(45, 42, 38, 0.08);
box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
}
.studio-main-card img {
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
width: 100%;
height: 100%;
object-fit: cover;
}
.studio-main-card::after {
content: "";
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
background:
linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.00) 28%, rgba(45, 42, 38, 0.12) 100%),
linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(45, 42, 38, 0.18) 0%, rgba(45, 42, 38, 0.00) 30%);
pointer-events: none;
}
.studio-main-card::before {
content: "";
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
z-index: 1;
border-radius: 24px;
padding: 1px;
background: linear-gradient(160deg,
rgba(168, 138, 109, 0.24),
transparent 40%,
transparent 60%,
rgba(142, 165, 150, 0.10));
-webkit-mask: linear-gradient(#fff 0 0) content-box, linear-gradient(#fff 0 0);
-webkit-mask-composite: xor;
mask-composite: exclude;
pointer-events: none;
}
.studio-main-label {
position: absolute;
left: 18px;
bottom: 18px;
z-index: 2;
display: inline-flex;
align-items: center;
min-height: 36px;
padding: 0 14px;
border-radius: 999px;
background: rgba(239, 236, 230, 0.62);
color: var(--ink);
border: 1px solid rgba(45, 42, 38, 0.08);
backdrop-filter: blur(10px);

/* =========================================================
SHARED ANIMATION / REVEAL SYSTEM
========================================================= */
@keyframes sonar {
0% {
transform: scale(1);
opacity: 0.8;
}
100% {
transform: scale(2.5);
opacity: 0;
}
}
.reveal-trigger .reveal-word {
display: inline-block;
opacity: 0;
transform: translateY(24px);
transition:
opacity 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1),
transform 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
}
.reveal-trigger.is-revealed .reveal-word {
opacity: 1;
transform: translateY(0);
}
.reveal-trigger .reveal-line {
opacity: 0;
transform: translateY(24px);
transition:
opacity 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1),
transform 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
}
.reveal-trigger.is-revealed .reveal-line {
opacity: 1;
transform: translateY(0);
}
.reveal-para {
opacity: 0;
transform: translateY(40px);
transition:
opacity 1.1s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1),
transform 1.1s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
}
.reveal-para.is-revealed {
opacity: 1;
transform: translateY(0);
}
.reveal-fade {
opacity: 0;
transform: translateY(12px);
transition:
opacity 1s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1),
transform 1s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
}
.reveal-fade.is-revealed {
opacity: 1;
transform: translateY(0);
}
.reveal-img {
opacity: 0;
transform: scale(1.05);
transition:
opacity 1.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1),
transform 1.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
}
.reveal-img.is-revealed {
opacity: 1;
transform: scale(1.01);
}

  <script>
    (function () {
    const updateFlashlight = (e) => {
      const card = e.currentTarget;
      const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
      card.style.setProperty('--mouse-x', `${e.clientX - rect.left}px`);
      card.style.setProperty('--mouse-y', `${e.clientY - rect.top}px`);
    };

    document.querySelectorAll('.method-card').forEach(card => {
      card.addEventListener('mousemove', updateFlashlight);
    });

    const revealEls = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal, .reveal-trigger, .reveal-para, .reveal-fade, .reveal-img, .reveal-seq');
    const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
          entry.target.classList.add('is-revealed');
          if (entry.target.classList.contains('reveal')) {
            entry.target.style.opacity = '1';
            entry.target.style.transform = 'translateY(0) scale(1)';
          }
          observer.unobserve(entry.target);
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.12 });

    revealEls.forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

    const faqItems = document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item-v1');

    faqItems.forEach(item => {
      const btn = item.querySelector('.faq-question-v1');
      const answer = item.querySelector('.faq-answer-v1');

      if (item.classList.contains('active')) {
        answer.style.maxHeight = answer.scrollHeight + 'px';
      }

      btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const isActive = item.classList.contains('active');

        faqItems.forEach(other => {
          other.classList.remove('active');
          const otherAnswer = other.querySelector('.faq-answer-v1');
          otherAnswer.style.maxHeight = null;
        });

        if (!isActive) {
          item.classList.add('active');
          answer.style.maxHeight = answer.scrollHeight + 'px';
        }
      });
    });

    const faqFilterTags = document.querySelectorAll('.faq-filter-tag-v1');

    faqFilterTags.forEach(tag => {
      tag.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const selectedCategory = tag.dataset.category;

        faqFilterTags.forEach(otherTag => otherTag.classList.remove('active'));
        tag.classList.add('active');

        faqItems.forEach(item => {
          const itemCategory = item.dataset.category;
          const shouldShow = selectedCategory === 'all' || itemCategory === selectedCategory;

          item.style.display = shouldShow ? '' : 'none';

          if (!shouldShow) {
            item.classList.remove('active');
            const answer = item.querySelector('.faq-answer-v1');
            answer.style.maxHeight = null;
          }
        });

        const firstVisible = Array.from(faqItems).find(item => item.style.display !== 'none');

        if (firstVisible) {
          firstVisible.classList.add('active');
          const firstAnswer = firstVisible.querySelector('.faq-answer-v1');
          firstAnswer.style.maxHeight = firstAnswer.scrollHeight + 'px';
        }
      });
    });
  })();
  </script>
